query: What does the batch transaction program CBTRN03C do?

results.name: 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM (lines 626-632)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: CALL CEE3ABD
results.summary: paragraph 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: CALL CEE3ABD.
results.content:
9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.                                                      
           DISPLAY 'ABENDING PROGRAM'                                           
           MOVE 0 TO TIMING                                                     
           MOVE 999 TO ABCODE                                                   
           CALL 'CEE3ABD' USING ABCODE, TIMING.                                 
                                                                                
      *****************************************************************

results.name: 9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE (lines 587-604)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
9400-TRANCATG-CLOSE.                                                     
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           CLOSE TRANCATG-FILE                                                  
           IF  TRANCATG-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR CLOSING TRANSACTION CATG FILE'                    
               MOVE TRANCATG-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1120-WRITE-DETAIL
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 1120-WRITE-DETAIL (lines 361-375)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC
results.summary: paragraph 1120-WRITE-DETAIL in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC.
results.content:
1120-WRITE-DETAIL.                                                       
           INITIALIZE TRANSACTION-DETAIL-REPORT                                 
           MOVE TRAN-ID TO TRAN-REPORT-TRANS-ID                                 
           MOVE XREF-ACCT-ID TO TRAN-REPORT-ACCOUNT-ID                          
           MOVE TRAN-TYPE-CD OF TRAN-RECORD TO TRAN-REPORT-TYPE-CD              
           MOVE TRAN-TYPE-DESC TO TRAN-REPORT-TYPE-DESC                         
           MOVE TRAN-CAT-CD OF TRAN-RECORD  TO TRAN-REPORT-CAT-CD               
           MOVE TRAN-CAT-TYPE-DESC TO TRAN-REPORT-CAT-DESC                      
           MOVE TRAN-SOURCE TO TRAN-REPORT-SOURCE                               
           MOVE TRAN-AMT TO TRAN-REPORT-AMT                                     
           MOVE TRANSACTION-DETAIL-REPORT TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                    
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0000-TRANFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 0000-TRANFILE-OPEN (lines 376-393)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0000-TRANFILE-OPEN in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-TRANFILE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT TRANSACT-FILE                                             
           IF TRANFILE-STATUS = '00'                                            
              MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                             
           ELSE                                                                 
              MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           END-IF                                                               
           IF APPL-AOK                                                          
              CONTINUE                                                          
           ELSE                                                                 
              DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANFILE'                                  
              MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                 
              PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                    
              PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                        
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1000-TRANFILE-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 1000-TRANFILE-GET-NEXT (lines 248-273)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1000-TRANFILE-GET-NEXT in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *.
results.content:
1000-TRANFILE-GET-NEXT.                                                  
           READ TRANSACT-FILE INTO TRAN-RECORD.                                 
                                                                                
           EVALUATE TRANFILE-STATUS                                             
             WHEN '00'                                                          
                 MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                          
             WHEN '10'                                                          
                 MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT                                         
             WHEN OTHER                                                         
                 MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                         
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
                                                                                
           IF APPL-AOK                                                          
              CONTINUE                                                          
           ELSE                                                                 
              IF APPL-EOF                                                       
                 MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE                                        
              ELSE                                                              
                 DISPLAY 'ERROR READING TRANSACTION FILE'                       
                 MOVE TRANFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                              
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
              END-IF                                                            
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
results.comments: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *

results.name: 1110-WRITE-PAGE-TOTALS
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN03C.cbl
Program: CBTRN03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Print the transaction detail report.
Paragraph: 1110-WRITE-PAGE-TOTALS (lines 293-305)
References: COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA03Y, COPY CVTRA04Y, COPY CVTRA07Y
Calls: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC
results.summary: paragraph 1110-WRITE-PAGE-TOTALS in CBTRN03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA03Y, CVTRA04Y.... invokes: PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
1110-WRITE-PAGE-TOTALS.                                                  
           MOVE WS-PAGE-TOTAL TO REPT-PAGE-TOTAL                                
           MOVE REPORT-PAGE-TOTALS TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                           
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD WS-PAGE-TOTAL TO WS-GRAND-TOTAL                                  
           MOVE 0 TO WS-PAGE-TOTAL                                              
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
           MOVE TRANSACTION-HEADER-2 TO FD-REPTFILE-REC                         
           PERFORM 1111-WRITE-REPORT-REC                                        
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNTER                                             
                                                                                
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
